info.title: Iris
info.description: API documentation for Iris, your no-nonsense, open-source CMS. All endpoints should be deemed internal and subject-to-change at any time unless otherwise noted.

get.description: Get the OpenAPI description for this API. Available only in development.
Get a list of Iris features supported by the backend.
Get information about the currently logged-in user.

type.description: Indicates the user is logged out.
Indicates the user is pending federation (i.e., has not finalized account creation/SSO connection).

existingAccount.description: The UUID of the existing user account, if any.

id.description: The ID of the user provided by the external auth provider.

email.description: The email of the user provided by the external auth provider.

name.description: The full name of the user provided by the external auth provider, if available.

type.description: Indicates the user is logged in and registered.

name.description: The user's full name, if available.

groups.description: A list of the groups the user is part of.

tags.name: base
tags.description: Endpoints available regardless of enabled features.

tags.name: auth
tags.description: Endpoints for the auth feature (always enabled).
